series_metadata.series_description: All documents and electronic systems (Old CE Legal- Duryee Old CE Legal- Covington, New CE Legal and Next CE Legal)related to CE (Continuing Education) Tracking and Administrative actions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after end of compliance period, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after end of compliance period, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
